prompt: High-definition pixel-art sprite, side view, full body, 128px tall, transparent background. A lean street-brawler ronin in a long open dark-indigo haori coat flaring off the shoulders, over segmented tech-armor; sleeves clear of bare wrapped forearms and taped knuckles; loose boxer's guard stance, weight forward, hands low and ready; half-face respirator, topknot; wearing a modern safety-green first-responder vest whose reflective strips glow as thin cyan neon light-lines; a glowing shoulder crest; a small blinking dispatch beacon on the sash. No visible weapon — at most a sword hilt barely hinted inside the coat at the back, never breaking the silhouette. Near-black palette, self-illuminated, crisp pixels, hard cel shading, no blur. Deadpan, cool, slightly tired posture. Neon-noir cyberpunk with Japanese Edo influence.
